WO-IMPL-HANG-FIX-PROXY-CACHE.title: IMPL: Phase A - Proxy Cache in Initializer
WO-IMPL-HANG-FIX-PROXY-CACHE.instruction_raw: Implement local variable caching in `initializer.py` to eliminate `__getattr__` overhead as specified in the MISSION_SPEC.

WO-IMPL-HANG-FIX-REGISTRY-LOCK.title: IMPL: Phase B - AccountRegistry Thread Safety
WO-IMPL-HANG-FIX-REGISTRY-LOCK.instruction_raw: Implement RLock in `AccountRegistry` to ensure thread safety during multi-threaded initialization as specified in the MISSION_SPEC.

WO-IMPL-HANG-FIX-BATCH-NOTIFY.title: IMPL: Phase C - GlobalRegistry Batch Mode
WO-IMPL-HANG-FIX-BATCH-NOTIFY.instruction_raw: Implement `batch_mode` context manager in `GlobalRegistry` and wrap `initializer.py` registration loops as specified in the MISSION_SPEC.

WO-IMPL-HANG-FIX-ADAPTER-OPT.title: IMPL: Phase D+E - Adapter Protocol & Logging Guard
WO-IMPL-HANG-FIX-ADAPTER-OPT.instruction_raw: Optimize protocol checks in `RegistryAccountAccessor` and downgrade logging levels in adapters as specified in the MISSION_SPEC.
